themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to public services, housing, and welfare. This theme is evident in Spain, Italy, and the UK, where parties like Vox, Lega, and Reform UK are either implementing or advocating for such measures, often clashing with coalition partners or opposition.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox pushes 'national priority' motions in Valencian town halls, opposing migrant regularization and advocating for locals in public services.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega in Vigevano faces internal conflict over Muslim candidates, reflecting tensions over national identity policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK proposes detaining illegal migrants in Green Party areas, exempting their own constituencies, to prioritize deportations.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN proposes restricting family allowances and social housing to French nationals if elected in 2027.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS criticizes new reprographic fees as unconstitutional, framing it as a tax burden on Polish citizens.

themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media across multiple countries are intensely covering the Trump administration's military actions against Iran, including the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the launch of 'Project Freedom.' This theme reflects shared concerns about U.S. foreign policy, NATO commitments, and the economic impact of the conflict, with leaders like Meloni and Salvini responding to Trump's actions.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump announces 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions, sparking global reactions.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni opposes U.S. troop withdrawal from Italy, emphasizing NATO commitments amid Trump's Iran strategy.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's immigration policies are framed as a response to global instability, including U.S.-Iran tensions.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox criticizes EU constraints and Trump's tariffs, warning of economic chaos amid regional conflicts.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS discusses U.S. troop presence in Europe with Trump, amid Pentagon's planned withdrawals from Germany.

themes.title: Meloni’s government longevity sparks cross-national debate
themes.blurb: Giorgia Meloni's government in Italy has become the second-longest in the country's republican history, sparking debates across Europe about the stability and effectiveness of far-right governance. This theme is particularly resonant in Germany, Hungary, and France, where leaders and analysts are assessing Meloni's policies and their implications for their own political landscapes.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government reaches 1,288 days in office, becoming Italy's second-longest, sparking debates on its effectiveness.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD criticizes German government's weakness, drawing parallels to Meloni's perceived stability in Italy.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Tisza Party's victory in Hungary sparks comparisons to Meloni's longevity and the potential for systemic change.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN's Bardella and Le Pen lead 2027 French presidential polls, with Meloni's success influencing their strategies.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS debates constitutional reforms, drawing parallels to Meloni's governance model and its impact on Poland.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are making significant gains in polls and elections across Europe, with notable surges in Germany, France, Sweden, and Norway. This theme reflects a broader trend of rising far-right influence, driven by concerns over immigration, economic instability, and dissatisfaction with mainstream parties. The coverage highlights both electoral successes and internal party dynamics.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads in German polls, with 28% support, ahead of the Union's 24%, amid rising dissatisfaction with the government.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN leads 2027 French presidential polls with 34-35% support for Bardella and 32-33% for Le Pen.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD breaks parliamentary voting agreement, sparking debates on democratic norms and far-right influence in Sweden.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP faces internal scandals but remains a key player in Norway's political landscape, with Sylvi Listhaug re-elected as leader.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK gains traction in UK polls, threatening Labour's dominance ahead of the May 7 elections.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence, with coverage highlighting threats, protests, and internal party scandals. This theme is evident in the U.S., UK, Italy, and Norway, where far-right figures and parties face backlash for inflammatory statements and actions that escalate tensions.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump faces criticism for rhetoric linked to political violence, including assassination attempts and threats.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK faces backlash over racist remarks by candidates and advisors, sparking debates on political violence.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega faces internal conflict over Muslim candidates, with Salvini criticizing local decisions, sparking protests.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP advisor's racist remarks spark outrage, with calls for disciplinary action and debates on political violence.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS faces internal divisions and protests, with critics accusing the party of fueling political tensions.
